title: VimFu — Ctrl-E
description: Ctrl-E scrolls the window one line up. The cursor stays put while the viewport moves. Fine-grained scrolling.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Control E scrolls the window one line down. The file moves up, but your cursor stays put.

steps.comment: Move cursor to middle of screen so scroll is visible

steps.say: Watch. The cursor is in the middle. Press control E three times.
Three lines scrolled off the top. The cursor stayed in place. The viewport moved under it.
Use a count. Five control E scrolls five lines at once.
Five more lines. Precise control over the viewport.
Control Y does the opposite. It scrolls the viewport up, revealing earlier lines.
Back up five lines. E scrolls down, Y scrolls up.
Control E. Scroll one line at a time. Fine-tuned viewport control.
